events.title: World Watch Party
events.description:
Join the Worlds biggest watch party at Utepils Brewing!

We’re showing EVERY match we can during business hours, and no matter your country, club, colors, or chants… there’s a seat for you here. Bring your flags. Bring your friends. Bring your game day energy. From opening whistle to final stoppage time, we’re your home for the Beautiful Game all tournament long.

Because the Beautiful Game deserves a Beautiful Beer. 🍻

Whether you’re cheering for a global powerhouse, the under dog, or just here for the vibes, Utepils is the place to watch.

A watch party for the World.

events.title: Trivia Mafia
events.description:
Trivia Mafia is a bar and brewery trivia operation based in Minneapolis, Minnesota. We produce the highest-quality trivia nights in bars, taprooms, distilleries, and private events every night of the week throughout the Midwest (and beyond!). We’ve also been known to run theme trivia nights, spelling bees, and other fine pub entertainments.

Get the team back together and join us every Wednesday night.
Tables will be first come first served in the Taproom and Beer Garden.

events.title: Cribbage Tournament
events.description:
Join us at our Taproom every Thursday for our weekly cribbage tournament!
Up to 32 individuals may sign up to play, so get here early and sign up quickly.
All skill levels are welcome to join.
The winner of the tournament receives a gift card and the title of Cribbage Champion…at least for a week.

events.title: Friday Night Live - FNL
events.description:
Friday Night Live  
FRIDAYS from 6:00PM - 8:00PM
Friday Night Live is a FREE Live Music Series open to ALL AGES. Every Friday from 6:00PM - 8:00PM (subject to change) for the next few months, FNL will be bringing in music from all over and all different genres.
Make sure to get here early so that you have time to shop and enjoy some live music!
See y'all there!

events.title: World Cup Street Fair
events.description:
WORLD CUP STREET FAIR 2026

TWO CITIES | ONE WORLD

The 2026 World Cup Street Fair brings to life what our local and global soccer fans have demanded: a true community viewing experience. All invited in celebration of the beautiful game!

July 4, 2026 · 10am to 8pm
Utepils Brewery, Minneapolis
Free Admission
ATTENDEES REGISTER — FREE SWAG BAG WHEN YOU REGISTER!🤝 PARTNERS & EXHIBITORS — REGISTER
ABOUT THE EVENT

EVENT OVERVIEW

Vida y Deportes is pleased to announce a free Men's World Cup Street Fair on Saturday, July 4, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. at Utepils Taproom (225 Thomas Ave N, Minneapolis).

The family-friendly festival will celebrate the 2026 FIFA Men's World Cup with a massive viewing screen, international food, live music, vendors, and a kids soccer tournament hosted by SOL of The Cities — highlighting futsal and youth participation in the sport and community.

This event is free to the public!

🥫 FOOD DRIVE

Bring donated canned goods! We'll be collecting for food programs distributed by East Side Neighborhood Services (NE Minneapolis) & The Sanneh Foundation (St. Paul).

❤️ GIVING BACK

A portion of proceeds raised will go to Camp Bovey — supporting kids who cannot afford Summer Camp.

SCHEDULE

10:00 AM
🎉GATES OPEN

Welcome to the World Cup Street Fair!

12:30 PM
🎵DJ THROUGHOUT – LIVE MUSIC STARTS

DJ sets kick off the celebration

1:00 PM
⚽FUTSAL TOURNAMENT BEGINS

5v5 hosted by SOL of The Cities

3:30 PM
📺LIVE MATCH VIEWING

World Cup match broadcast on massive screens

5:00 PM
🎭HALF-TIME SHOW

Dance performances & prize giveaways

7:00 PM
🌟LIVE MUSIC AND DJ

Dred I Dread + special guest performers

8:00 PM
👋EVENT CLOSES

See you next time!

WHAT TO EXPECT

A FULL DAY OF ACTIVITIES AT OUR WORLD CUP STREET FAIR 2026

YOUTH FUTSAL TOURNAMENT

SOL of The Cities will be hosting a 5v5 youth tournament — Winner takes all and a Grand Prize!

LIVE MUSIC & PERFORMANCE

Live Music from Dred I Dread, a highly popular and well recognized reggae group with international notoriety. Plus a special guest and DJ will be announced in the coming days.

FOOD TRUCKS & VENDORS

Authentic global foods will be available for purchase, including artisan market vendors throughout the venue.

WCSF COMMUNITY VILLAGE

Connect with local organizations, sponsors, and community groups all in one place.

WORLD CUP VIEWING

Live World Cup matches on massive screens with thousands of fellow fans. Line-up of countries will be announced as we draw closer to semi-finals.

KIDS SAFE ZONE

Safe, fun activities for children, free books and school supplies, including face painting, games, and mini soccer drills. More to come…

VENUE LOCATION

FIND THE VENUE

Utepils Taproom · 225 Thomas Ave N, Minneapolis, MN 55405

GET DIRECTIONS

events.title: Yoga Flow with Annie Hayes
events.description:
A relaxed, all-levels yoga class held inside Utepils Brewing—flow, stretch, and unwind, then stick around to enjoy a fresh craft beer with the community. 🧘‍♀️🍺

Join us for The Original Yoga + Beer, a laid-back flow designed to wake up your body, lighten your mood, and ease you into the day.

✨ What’s Included
• 50-min all-levels yoga class 🧘‍♀️
• A pint (or other beverage) 🍺
• A side of humor + community 💛

💵 Cost: $15
(Eventbrite, Venmo, or cash at the door - no refunds, but tickets roll over for a future class!)

☀️ What to Expect
We’ll start slow, warm up the body, move through a gentle flow, and finish with energy to seize the day.

 

Buy Tickets Here!

events.title: International Café
events.description:
Join Utepils Brewing for a language café/intercambio style casual multilingual hangout from 2pm - 5pm.

 

Show up to the Taproom and scan the QR code to check out the INT'L CAFE website and grab FREE tickets to the event, if you haven't already.

Next,

  1. Put on your language stickers 🔖
  2. Grab a beverage at the bar 🍺
  3. Pick a language table 🗣️
  4. Introduce yourself 👋
  5. Have a good time! 🎉

This event is FREE to attend, but donations are always welcome 😁

events.title: Analog Game Night
events.description:
Mondays just got more FUN!

Calling all hobbyists, gamers, and casual players alike! Join us every Monday night for Analog Game Night — a weekly gathering of game enthusiasts ready to roll dice, shuffle decks, and sip great brews.

Bring your favorite game and find a spot in our cozy taproom! Whether you’re into MTG Commander, Catan, Chess, Monopoly, Uno, or Cards Against Humanity, all games (and players) are welcome.

Want to dive deeper into tabletop or RPG games like D&D? Let us know — if there’s interest, we’ll add more tables for that too!

So grab your crew (or come solo and make new friends), enjoy some fresh Utepils beer, and get your game on.

Free to play. Fun guaranteed.

In the meantime, it's Sunday and we would love to share a few brews with you!

events.title: Backgammon & Brews
events.description:
Backgammon & Brews is BACK
Join us for Backgammon & Brews, a meet-up event where backgammon enthusiasts of all experience levels gather to enjoy a fun night of rolling dice in briefcases at the Utepils taproom. The meet-up is designed for casual games and provides all players – from backgammon beginners to experts – an opportunity to socialize, play and enjoy a beverage or two!
What: Backgammon & Brews Meet-up
Where: Utepils Taproom
When: Recurring 1st Monday of every month
Time: 7:00pm-9:00pm
A few backgammon sets will be provided, but if you have your own backgammon set, please bring it with you.
Everyone is welcome, so please help spread the word!

events.title: FREE Meat & Cheese Raffle
events.description:
It’s Tuesday… and you know what that means!
TONIGHT from 6:00PM – 8:00PM, our FREE Meat & Cheese Raffle is back!
Here’s how it works:
Grab a beer → get a raffle ticket
Every 10 minutes, we draw winners
Meat from Kramarczuk’s + cheese from Redhead Creamery up for grabs!
(Must be present to win)
Want extra chances to win?
Bring a non-perishable food item or donate to support our friends at NorthPoint Health & Wellness Center!
Come for the beer, stay for the prizes, and leave with some delicious winnings.
We can’t wait to hang out with y’all tonight… Meat you there?

events.title: Merchant Leather - Leatherworking Class
events.description:
Merchant Leather Presents

Leatherworking Classes at Utepils Brewing

2nd Tuesdays of Each Month

6:30-8:30pm

$55 per person
Pre-register and get your first beer/drink free!


Age/Level: Ages 12+ with adult. Beginner-friendly.

Dive into leatherworking! This fun, entry-level workshop introduces you to the timeless craft of hand-stitching leather.

This workshop offers the chance to complete one medium project or two small projects. Choose from 20+ options - from notebook covers and purses to wallets, belts, and more - then select your leather color and type to make it uniquely yours. You’ll be guided through every step: marking, punching, hand-stitching, and finishing.

Along the way, you’ll pick up skills you can use for future projects and experience the satisfaction of making something built to last. Whether you’re making a gift, trying a new skill, or just enjoying a creative night out, you’ll leave with a finished leather good that’s as functional as it is beautiful.

Click HERE to sign-up!
